firmware.title: Android 4.4.4 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Nexus 7 to 4.4.4, which improves performance, security, stability and fixes bugs.

firmware.title: Android 5.0.2 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Nexus 7 to Android 5.0.2, which improves performance and stability and fixes bugs. Downloading via Wi-Fi is recommended. Downloading over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 5.1 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Nexus 7 to Android 5.1, which improves performance and stability and fixes bugs. Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android System Update
firmware.description:
This software update will improve the security of your Nexus 7 with the May 2016 patches.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
